title: Graph insights stay deterministic and memory-adjacent
summary: Kage should uses repo-intelligence useful graph intelligence as deterministic analysis over the existing source graph: central files, dependency cycles, import communities, and entry flows. Keep it separate from generated doc
body:
Kage should uses repo-intelligence useful graph intelligence as deterministic analysis over the existing source graph: central files, dependency cycles, import communities, and entry flows. Keep it separate from generated documentation and use it to orient agents before broad architecture edits.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp; node mcp/dist/cli.js graph-insights --project . --json
